title: Feature Requirement
description: A feature-based requirement — a reusable predicate over a feature value. Used by property list filters today; designed for reuse in other surfaces (audience filters, creative gates) in future versions. Use min_value/max_value for quantitative features, allowed_values for binary/categorical features.

min_value.description: Minimum numeric value required (for quantitative features)

max_value.description: Maximum numeric value allowed (for quantitative features)

allowed_values.description: Values that pass the requirement (for binary/categorical features)

if_not_covered.description: How to handle properties where this feature is not covered. 'exclude' (default): property is removed from the list. 'include': property passes this requirement (fail-open).

policy_id.description: Optional attribution — when this requirement exists to satisfy a specific policy, policy_id references the authorizing PolicyEntry. Reserved field; populated by producers in 3.1 and later (see issue #2303). Governance agents MAY ignore in 3.0.
policy_id.$comment: x-entity deliberately omitted — a PolicyEntry reference can resolve to either a governance_registry_policy or a governance_inline_policy depending on the authorizing entry's source. See issue #2685.
